summary_of_case: National aggregate: 1,712 drone incidents at prisons across England and Wales between April 2024 and March 2025; 43% YoY increase; 10-fold rise since 2020; payloads include drugs phones and weapons; over 70 convictions secured

location: Kaine Jones gang; multiple prisons (England Scotland Wales)
summary_of_case: 12-month organised operation by Kaine Jones (age 28) and 7-person gang targeting multiple prisons across England Scotland and Wales; custom-built hand-assembled drones; payloads of cannabis resin MDMA and tobacco; estimated £1.7M street value; up to £50K per delivery; Jones arrested at Birmingham Airport 30 September 2024; convicted June 2025; 6-year sentence; 7 offenders totalling 31 years combined
platform_source: West Mercia Police; Telegraph; KHQ Feb 2026
row_note: Arrest at Birmingham Airport confirmed; conviction June 2025 confirmed; £1.7M street value and 31 combined years from West Mercia Police press release

location: Lviv; Ukraine (training location; criminal actor is Mexican cartel operative)
summary_of_case: Mexican cartel operative codename Águila-7 embedded within Ukrainian International Legion unit in Lviv using Salvadoran fake papers and humanitarian cover story; completed full FPV drone piloting course March 2024; former Mexican GAFE (Grupo Aeromóvil de Fuerzas Especiales) background; explicit intent to transfer FPV skills to cartel operations; Ukrainian counterintelligence identified and investigated; vetting procedures enhanced; confirmed direct military-to-criminal skill transfer
platform_source: Intelligence Online Jul 2024; bne IntelliNews Jul 2025; Atlantic Council Sep 2025; Cronkite News Feb 2026
row_note: This is the primary confirmed Ukraine-to-criminal transfer case; training location is Lviv; Águila-7 is the confirmed codename; GAFE background confirmed by Ukrainian counterintelligence
